reviews.comment:
Los baños muy limpios.Pero te roban cuando haces carga virtual,te cobran una coima,y encima te dan café tibio te tratan mal las mozas

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are very clean. But they rip you off when you top up your phone credit; they charge you a bribe, and on top of that, they give you lukewarm coffee and the waitresses treat you badly.
